title: ENOKING Wooden Universal Knife Block, Knife Block Without Knives, Acacia Wood Knife Holder Storage Stand with Removable Plastic Bristles for Kitchen Counter Knife Storage Rack（2-Tier）
features: KNIFE BLOCK BUILTED IN PLASTIC BRISTLES- The ENOKING Universal Knife Block builted in plastic bristles, it is more tighter and durable, can protect Knives sharp for a long time, lab data proved it. Even if you put full block of knives, they won't affect each other.

LARGE CAPACITY,FREE PLACEMENT KNIFE HOLDER- This is a flexible, hygienic and safe way to storage your knives, not just one slot or drawer. Suitable for blade thickness less than 3mm, Blade width less than 10cm Blade length less than 21.5cm.

NATURAL ACACIA WOOD OF KNIFE ORGANIZER- Acacia wood is a symbol of quality material, often used in furniture, crafts, strong and durable. Also, wooden knife rack prevents knives from getting dull, as they prevent unnecessary friction with other metals.

REMOVABLE BRISTLES & EASY TO CLEAN- This ENOKING Knife Block do not need to be installed, you can use it after receiving. The knife holder is made of natural wood and removable bristles, the surface is specially treated with natural mineral oil, If you need to clean, just take out of it and use a clean cloth to wipe it.

NON-SLIP BASE AND BREATHABLE DESIGN- This ENOKING Knife Block is installed with a non-slip base that prevent it from dangerously sliding around on your kitchen counter. Ventilation and Breathable, away from the bacteria.

24 HOURS CUSTOMER SERVICE - All of the ENOKING product's packaging are upgraded to ensure that every product is delivered to you in perfect condition. If you have any needs, please don't hesitate to contact us. We will try our best to solve the problem for you.
